title: 第2節　社裏の連れ去り線
chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し

prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第2話　折り返して戻る. Scene focus: 第2節　社裏の連れ去り線 / セラパート. Summary: 水神社の裏手では、管理人補佐を装った男が細長い拘束ケースを抱え、路地側では軽バンの後部扉がいつでも閉まる角度で待機していた。石段で歩幅を落とした標的を社の影へ誘い、口を塞いで荷… Key beats: 水神社の裏手では、管理人補佐を装った男が細長い拘束ケースを抱え、路地側では軽バンの後部扉がいつでも閉まる角度で待機していた。石段で歩幅を落とした標的を社の影へ誘い、口を塞いで荷物のように積む。折り返し地点は人が少し気を抜くから、その一瞬を狙ったのだろう。神社の裏を使う発想まで含めて、あまり上品ではない。 セラは石灯籠の影から、ケースの金具と車体の位置関係を一度で見た。猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニットが拾う呼吸は三人分。表側に一人、社務所の壁沿いに一人、路地に一人。サトーが水を飲みきるまでの時間で十分足りる。 「神前でやるには、汚いやり口です」 最初に壁際の男の口元へ手刀を入れ、声だけを切る。その反動でケース持ちの肘が開いたところへ、セラの膝が脇腹へ入った。ケースは地面へ落ちる前に受け取り、音も立てず石段脇へ寝かせる。路地の男が扉を開けかけた瞬間には、軽バンの影から足首を払って舗道へ転がし、頸部ではなく肩口へ浅い針を打ち込んだ。三人は数秒で動かなくなる。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same shrine-turnaround incident as scene-002-002-001-sato. Keep the same shrine grounds, same stone steps, and same spring light as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure pausing or turning back, and must not look toward Sera or the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert shrine-back action image with Sera dominant as she stops disguised abductors using a restraint case and a service-lane vehicle behind a small riverside shrine. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply taking a walking break and unaware.
